name: Starter Creative
description: Perfect for startups needing clean custom illustrations and micro-animations for their web/app interface.

monthly.caption: A simple design lane for clean, branded web and mobile interface assets.

yearly.caption: Annual retainer for continuous asset generation and support.

name: Growth Motion
description: Ideal for marketing and product teams that need complete explainer videos or brand motion systems.
features: 1 Custom explainer video (up to 60s) or 6 social clips
Complete custom illustration system (up to 8 assets)
Advanced Lottie UI animations (up to 5 assets)
Dynamic motion branding transitions & logo intros

monthly.caption: Ideal for launching product explanation campaigns and upgrading brand aesthetics.

yearly.caption: The best choice for continuous video, social, and interface design production.

name: Creative Partner
description: A dedicated design partnership for high-fidelity multi-video campaigns and full interactive UI systems.
features: Multi-video campaigns or complete UI motion libraries
Custom character designs and interactive animations
Advanced 3D assets and dynamic motion integration
Dedicated creative squad and sprint planning
Complete brand illustration system and guidelines

monthly.caption: Designed for brands that want consistent, high-end motion and design embedded in their team.

yearly.caption: Designed for ongoing design sprints, scaling libraries, and continuous video content production.
